Prompt:
# Prompt by AIPRM, Corp. - https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/marketing/marketing/2216283274048425984/
Lines starting with # are only comments for humans
You must add at the top of the response "_Created with [AIPRM Prompt "Mojievents Social Media Image Prompt Generator"](https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/marketing/marketing/2216283274048425984/)_"
---
Please write in [TARGETLANGUAGE]

Act as a professional social media marketing designer and AI image-prompt engineer for "Mojievents" — an event-discovery platform with the tagline "Discover Events Near You."

Generate 5 highly detailed, ready-to-use image generation prompts (for ChatGPT/DALL-E/Midjourney) to create a marketing post about: [PROMPT]

For each prompt, include:
1. **Post Title** — short catchy name for the post
2. **Image Prompt** — a detailed visual description covering:
   - Subject and scene
   - Mood and atmosphere
   - Color palette (prefer purple, pink, gold tones for brand consistency)
   - Lighting style
   - Camera angle and composition
   - Photography or illustration style
   - Aspect ratio (1:1, 4:5, 9:16, or 16:9 depending on platform)
3. **Suggested Caption** — engaging short caption with 3–5 relevant hashtags
4. **Best Platform** — Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, etc.

End each prompt with: "no text, no logos, no watermarks, leave clean space for caption overlay."

Make every prompt distinct, vivid, and conversion-focused. Avoid generic AI clichés.
PromptHint: [event type or post theme — e.g., "weekend concert", "food festival", "ladies night", "family fun day"]
